name: Sardine Blog
description: Official blog from Sardine covering fraud prevention, AML compliance, financial crime, KYC/KYB, device intelligence, and agentic AI in fintech.

posts.title: Anthropic released a KYC agent: Here's what it actually is, and who should use it
posts.author: Chen Zamir
posts.description: Examines Anthropic's finance-agents release and their KYC screener tool, separating actual product capabilities from media coverage and assessing fit for compliance needs.
